data.title: Apple Slams Meta's Interoperability Demands, Cites Privacy Risks — Instagram Parent Fires Back: Cupertino's Assertions Have 'No Basis In Reality'
data.description: Apple has criticized Meta's interoperability requests under the EU's Digital Markets Act, citing privacy risks, while Meta accuses Apple of using privacy concerns as a pretext for anticompetitive behavior.

data.title: OpenAI Takes A Page From Google's 2007 Playbook, Turns Phones Into AI Hotlines With 1-800-CHATGPT
data.description: OpenAI has launched a toll-free service, 1-800-CHATGPT, allowing users to access ChatGPT for free with a 15-minute monthly call, echoing Google's 2007 GOOG-411 initiative.

data.title: CVS Faces DOJ Lawsuit Alleging Violations Of Controlled Substances Act And False Claims Act Over Opioid Prescriptions
data.description: The U.S. Department of Justice filed a civil complaint against CVS Pharmacy Inc owned by CVS Health Corp, alleging the nation's largest pharmacy chain violated the Controlled Substances Act by filling unlawful prescriptions for dangerous opioid combinations and quantities from 2013 onwards.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Higher After Plunging On Powell's Hawkish Comments: Analyst Calls It A 'Healthy' Reaction From An 'Overly Optimistic' Market
data.description: U.S. stock futures climbed on Thursday in premarket hours after a hawkish cut from the Federal Reserve on Wednesday.
